description: You are the Security Manager at a commercial property management company. A compliance audit has flagged that the VMS is failing to maintain continuous 24/7 surveillance. Log in to the Nx Witness Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (credentials: admin / Admin1234!). Ensure every camera in the system is configured for 24/7 continuous high-quality recording. Create a shared monitoring layout named 'Compliance Audit View' containing all cameras in the system.
